tasks.label: Check running build processes
args: Get-Process vcpkg,ninja,cl,cmake -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName,Id,CPU | Sort-Object ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: Wait VTK then Build x64
args: & { Wait-Process -Name vcpkg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; C:/tools/vcpkg/vcpkg.exe list | findstr /I '^vtk:'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error 'vtk:x64-windows not installed yet'; exit 1 }; cmake -S . -B build-vs2017-x64 -A x64 -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=C:/tools/vcpkg/scripts/buildsystems/vcpkg.cmake -DVCPKG_TARGET_TRIPLET=x64-windows; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cmake --build build-vs2017-x64 --config Release }

tasks.label: Monitor install/build status
args: $v=Get-Process vcpkg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $n=Get-Process ninja -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($v){'vcpkg=running'} else {'vcpkg=stopped'}; if($n){'ninja=running'} else {'ninja=stopped'}

tasks.label: Monitor status simple
tasks.command: Get-Process vcpkg,ninja -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName,Id,CPU | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: Monitor status simple 2
tasks.command: Get-Process vcpkg,ninja -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName,Id,CPU,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: Finalize after VTK install
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Wait-Process -Name vcpkg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; C:/tools/vcpkg/vcpkg.exe list | findstr /I '^vtk:'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'vtk:x64-windows not installed' }; cmake -S . -B build-vs2017-x64 -A x64 -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=C:/tools/vcpkg/scripts/buildsystems/vcpkg.cmake -DVCPKG_TARGET_TRIPLET=x64-windows; cmake --build build-vs2017-x64 --config Release

tasks.label: Poll VTK progress
tasks.command: Get-Process vcpkg,ninja -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName,Id,CPU | Sort-Object ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: Poll VTK progress 2
tasks.command: Get-Process vcpkg,ninja -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName,Id,CPU,StartTime | Sort-Object ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: Poll VTK status
tasks.command: if (Get-Process vcpkg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { 'vcpkg=running' } else { 'vcpkg=stopped' }; if (Get-Process ninja -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { 'ninja=running' } else { 'ninja=stopped' }

tasks.label: Find VTK build errors
tasks.command: Select-String -Path 'C:/tools/vcpkg/buildtrees/vtk/install-x64-windows-dbg-out.log' -Pattern 'error C[0-9]+|FAILED:|fatal error|error LNK' | Select-Object -Last 30 LineNumber,Line | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap | Out-String

tasks.label: Poll build status
tasks.command: if (Get-Process vcpkg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { 'vcpkg=running' } else { 'vcpkg=stopped' }; if (Get-Process ninja -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { 'ninja=running' } else { 'ninja=stopped' }

tasks.label: Scan active VTK errors
tasks.command: Select-String -Path 'C:/tools/vcpkg/buildtrees/vtk/install-x64-windows-dbg-out.log' -Pattern 'error C[0-9]+|FAILED:|fatal error|error LNK|ninja: build stopped' | Select-Object -Last 20 LineNumber,Line | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap | Out-String
